column6: The test was easy, all based on electronics (basic) and electricals and some aptitude questions.
column9:
HR round was easy to pass, the only struggle lies to reach HR round, after passing 2 technical Interviews you will reach HR,
Questions asked are:
1.whats your nature.?
2.what do u do other than studies.?
3.what do you do if u have leadership responsibility,?
4.why did u choose CMRIT.?
5.Why do u think Johnson Control is right place for you to work.?
column10:
There were 2 technical rounds L1,L2
L1 Round:
They will test your communication skills and project based outcomes
Questions:
Introduce about yourself and talk about your family and where do you live?
Tell me something about your projects?
What is a relay?
What is a diode?
What is the contact switch ?

column6: Aptitude level was easy there were around 75 questions and most of them were based on electronics and electricals basic questions
column9:
1st Technical Interview round was based on core electronics knowledge 
2nd Technical interview was totally based on electronics real time application and scenario based questions
HR round was personal interaction 
1 Tell me about yourself 
2 Family Background 
3 What is your discomfort zone
4 What is your nature
column10: What is resistance, sensors,transducers,encoders and about projects Relays

column9:
There are 2 technical round namely L1 and L2 and a HR interview.
In L1- It went around 20 mins staring from introduction to technical questions on the subject background specifically 
1) what is a relay
2) difference between microprocessor and microcontroller
3) difference between MOSFET and bjt 
4)which type of current flows in our home and what type
5)what is rectifier?types?
6)Types of transmitter
7) explain a home appliances in terms of electronics 
8) difference between electrical and electronics 
9) explain the process of ac in terms of electronics
10) Explain mobile application complete working 
11) questions on projects
12)Family background
13)hobbies
14)What is ohm's law
15)Any questions

column6: Aptitude cum technical round, was easy but need to complete as soon as possible
column9:
HR was really kind .
Some of the basic HR question to be prepared are-
Complete knowledge about urself , parents , family , college etc 
What if I reject ? How would u feel ? 
Why are u different from others that I shlould hire you ? 
What extra qualities do you have than the others waiting outside ? 
What I u fail as a leader ? What will u do ? 
If in a team of 10 members and out the 10, 9 of them are not ready to cooperate with you then what would you do?
Learn about the currents affairs like I was asked about olympics and para olympic 
Many more…….
column10:
L1 interview——
All questions based on the project ( to study each and every component of the project and it’s real time application) 
What is thermistor ? 
Name 15 RLC components ? 
What are your strengths and weaknesses? 
How does an Opamp work ?  

L2 interview——
What is ur favourite subject?? And they will go deeeep into the subject? ( choose electronic related subjects for core company and vice Versa for software company ) be thorough about the subject .
What is relay ? 
Real time application of relay ? 
What is micro processor and real time application? 
What is micro processor and real time application?
Explain one micro controller in detail ? 
And all questions based on resume 
What are logic gates ? 
Draw all logic gates and mention any 2 truth table ? 
What is k- map y do we use that ? 
And many more
column11: Core company hence no coding question
